assets.query: two people introducing a third person in classroom
assets.rationale: A simple real-world social image helps the learner understand that นี่คือ... is used to introduce a person standing there, not only to label objects.

assets.rationale: A single person photo or portrait card makes the who-question concrete and supports pointing-based practice.
